Initializer# init(contentsOfFile:uniformTypeIdentifier:)



```
convenience init(
    contentsOfFile url: URL,
    uniformTypeIdentifier identifier: String
)
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/init(contentsOfFile:uniformTypeIdentifier:)#discussion)

Creates an attachment with an existing file on disk and type.

Note

Only works for files, not directories.
